Name: SAMZ Warehouse Inspection – Kabwe Depot – Maize Lot ZM-KBW-2025-0112, 1,800 MT
Description: Zambia Agricultural Commodity Exchange (ZAMACE) accredited warehouse inspection for 1,800 MT white maize (Grade 1, moisture 12.8%) stored at Kabwe SAMZ-registered warehouse W-ZM-045. Inspector: Mr. Joseph Mumba. Issued collateral receipt WR-ZM-2025-0112. Temperature and humidity logs verified.

Name: SAMZ Warehouse Inspection – Chipata COMESA Hub – Soya Beans Lot EP-CPT-2025-0056, 920 MT
Description: SAMZ warehouse inspection for 920 MT soya beans (oil content 17.8%, moisture 10.2%) at Chipata COMESA Agri Hub warehouse W-ZM-078. Inspector: Ms. Chanda Mwale. Pest inspection passed – nil aflatoxin detected. Issued collateral receipt WR-ZM-2025-0056.

Name: SAMZ Warehouse Inspection – Lusaka Cold Store – Tomatoes Lot LK-2025-0088, 48 MT
Description: ZAMACE cold-store inspection for 48 MT Roma tomatoes (Grade 1, No. 1 size) in controlled atmosphere storage at Lusaka Cold Chain Hub, temperature 7–10°C. Inspector: Mr. Aaron Tembo. Storage lot LK-2025-0088. Shelf-life certificate 21 days from pack date.

Name: SAMZ Warehouse Inspection – Mongu FRA Depot – Cassava Flour Lot WP-MNG-2025-0034, 310 MT
Description: SAMZ inspection for 310 MT cassava flour (HQCF grade, moisture 12.5%, cyanide <10 ppm) at Mongu Food Reserve Agency depot. Inspector: Mr. Lubasi Mwanza. Passed ZBS standard ZS 1025. HQCF suitability certificate for industrial blending issued.

Name: SAMZ Warehouse Inspection – Livingstone Horticulture Hub – Baby Veg Lot SP-LVS-2025-0021, 22 MT
Description: SAMZ cold-chain warehouse inspection for 22 MT premium baby vegetables (mangetout, fine beans, baby corn, courgette) at Livingstone Horticulture Export Hub, pre-cooled to 4°C. GlobalG.A.P. and BRC certification compliant. IoT temperature logger data hash verified.

Name: SAMZ Warehouse Inspection – Mkushi Farm Block – Groundnuts Lot CB-MKS-2025-0067, 540 MT
Description: SAMZ warehouse inspection for 540 MT Zambia-1 groundnuts from Mkushi farm block, grade 1 (oil content 47%, aflatoxin <5 ppb), stored at ZAMACE-registered warehouse W-ZM-112. Inspector: Ms. Grace Phiri. Collateral receipt issued for ZANACO AgriFinance facility WR-ZM-2025-0067.

Name: SAMZ Warehouse Inspection – Kafue Agri Hub – Sunflower Seed Lot SP-KFE-2025-0045, 680 MT
Description: ZAMACE-accredited inspection for 680 MT sunflower seed (oil content 40%, moisture 9.8%) at Kafue Agri Processing Hub. ZAMACE warehouse receipt WR-ZM-2025-0045 issued. Certified for PRIMOIL crushing facility under supplier agreement PA-2025-012.

Name: SAMZ Warehouse Inspection – Samfya Fish Depot – Kapenta Lot LP-SFY-2025-0013, 85 MT
Description: SAMZ warehouse inspection for 85 MT sun-dried kapenta (Lake Bangweulu, grade 1, moisture <18%) at Samfya Fish Processing Depot cold-storage facility W-ZM-156. ZBS quality certificate ZBS-KAP-2025-0131. ZAMACE collateral receipt WR-ZM-2025-0013 issued.

Name: Agri Trade Hub – Maize Delivery – Kabwe Depot to Lusaka Miller, 500 MT
Description: Road logistics delivery of 500 MT white maize from ZAMACE-registered Kabwe depot to National Milling Company Lusaka. Driver manifest NMC-ZAT-2025-0312, 5 trucks (100 MT each), gross weight verified at Lusaka weigh-bridge. Delivery confirmation signed by Miller QC officer.

Name: Agri Trade Hub – Soya Beans Delivery – Chipata Hub to Kafue Crushing, 340 MT
Description: Road delivery of 340 MT soya beans from Chipata COMESA Hub to Kafue PRIMOIL crushing plant. ZAMACE grade 1, moisture 10.2%. Truck manifest KPS-ZAT-2025-0178, 4 trucks, ZMW delivery value computed at ZMW 17,000/MT.

Name: Agri Trade Hub – Groundnuts Delivery – Mkushi to Lusaka Export Hub, 200 MT
Description: Delivery of 200 MT grade-1 groundnuts (shelled) from Mkushi farm block cold store to Lusaka Export Hub for export packaging. Aflatoxin tested and cleared (<5 ppb). Truck manifest MKL-ZAT-2025-0212, delivery confirmed by Lusaka Hub QC manager.

Name: Agri Trade Hub – Cotton Delivery – Chipata Ginnery to Lusaka Textile, 120 MT
Description: 120 MT ginned cotton lint (grade 1, staple 30mm) from Chipata Ginnery to Lusaka Textile Mills for local fabric production. Eastern Cotton Board certificate ECB-2025-0522. Manifest LT-ZAT-2025-0089.

Name: Agri Trade Hub – Kapenta Delivery – Samfya to Lusaka Distribution, 35 MT
Description: 35 MT sun-dried kapenta (grade 1, Bangweulu harvest) from Samfya Fish Depot to Lusaka Soweto Market wholesale distribution centre. Refrigerated truck manifest LSD-ZAT-2025-0045. ZBS food safety certificate ZBS-KAP-2025-0131 attached.

Name: Agri Trade Hub – Cassava Flour Delivery – Mongu to Lusaka Bakers, 80 MT
Description: 80 MT HQCF cassava flour (ZS 1025, 12% moisture) from Mongu FRA depot to Lusaka-based bread producers for wheat-cassava composite flour programme. MoA composite flour programme PO CF-2025-0034. Delivered to National Baking Co. Lusaka.

Name: Agri Trade Hub – Sunflower Oil Delivery – Kafue Plant to Supermarkets, 28,000 Litres
Description: 28,000 litres refined sunflower oil in 5-litre bottles from PRIMOIL Kafue crushing plant delivered to Shoprite Zambia distribution warehouse Lusaka. ZBS quality certificate ZBS-OIL-2025-0089. Manifest PRM-ZAT-2025-0301. GS1 barcode compliance verified.

Name: Zambia Agri Trade Hub – Cold Chain – Lusaka Cold Store – Tomatoes – 48 MT, 7–10°C
Description: Cold chain event: 48 MT Roma tomatoes received at Lusaka Cold Chain Hub, pre-cooled from ambient 28°C to target 7°C within 4 hours. IoT logger TCC-2025-0088 continuous record hash attached. ZBS quality certificate confirms brix 4.5, firmness Grade 1.

Name: Zambia Agri Trade Hub – Cold Chain – Livingstone Horticulture Hub – Baby Veg – 22 MT, 4°C
Description: Cold chain event: 22 MT premium baby vegetables pre-cooled to 4°C at Livingstone Horticulture Hub pack-house prior to airfreight from LKIA. GlobalG.A.P. certificate GP-ZM-2025-0021 and BRC Food audit score 87/100. Continuous temperature log TLV-2025-0021 hash.

Name: Zambia Agri Trade Hub – Cold Chain – Chisamba Floral Hub – Cut Roses – 1,800 kg, 2–4°C
Description: Cold chain event for 1,800 kg cut roses (red, yellow, white) from Chisamba flower farms. Pre-cooled to 2–4°C within 2 hours of harvest. ZANIS phytosanitary certificate PHY-2025-0412. Air-cargo temperature logger TFC-2025-0412 continuous record hash. Destination: Amsterdam Aalsmeer flower market.

Name: Zambia Agri Trade Hub – Cold Chain – Mkushi Mushrooms – 3,200 kg, 2–4°C
Description: Cold chain event for 3,200 kg fresh oyster and shiitake mushrooms from Mkushi commercial mushroom farm. Packaged and pre-cooled to 2–4°C, transported to Lusaka Premium Market. Logger TMP-2025-0167 verified. Shelf-life 10 days from harvest.

Name: Zambia Agri Trade Hub – Cold Chain – Pemba Avocado Farm – 6,400 kg, 5–7°C
Description: Cold chain event for 6,400 kg Hass avocado (grade 1, ≥200g per fruit) from Pemba commercial avocado farm, Southern Province, pre-cooled to 5–7°C for export via LKIA to UK (Tesco). ZANIS phytosanitary certificate PHY-2025-0533. GlobalG.A.P. cert GP-ZM-2025-0078.

Name: Zambia Agri Trade Hub – Cross-Border Export – Groundnuts to South Africa – COMESA CoO
Description: COMESA Certificate of Origin for 120 MT shelled groundnuts (grade 1, <5 ppb aflatoxin) exported from Zambia to South Africa (Joburg Food Market). Certificate CO-ZM-2025-0312. DALRRD South Africa import permit SA-AGR-2025-0145. ZBS phytosanitary clearance attached.

Name: Zambia Agri Trade Hub – Cross-Border Export – Honey to EU – COMESA CoO
Description: COMESA CoO and EU health certificate for 8,400 kg natural raw honey exported from Zambia to Germany (Hamburg) via LKIA. EU health certificate EU-HC-ZM-2025-0034. ZBS quality certificate ZBS-HNY-2025-0034. Organic certification from ZOCA attached.

Name: Zambia Agri Trade Hub – Cross-Border Export – Sun-Dried Kapenta to DRC
Description: Cross-border export certificate for 28 MT sun-dried kapenta from Samfya to Lubumbashi, DRC via Kasumbalesa border. DRC import permit DRC-MIN-2025-0178. ZBS food safety certificate ZBS-KAP-2025-0167 and COMESA CoO CO-ZM-2025-0389 attached.

Name: Zambia Agri Trade Hub – Cross-Border Import – Onions from Zimbabwe – CBT Certificate
Description: Cross-border trade certificate for 85 MT brown onions imported from Zimbabwe (Harare) via Chirundu One-Stop Border Post. COMESA preferential tariff applied. ZRA clearance entry ZRA-CHI-2025-9912. Zimbabwe Farmers Union phytosanitary certificate ZFU-PHY-2025-0056.

Name: Zambia Agri Trade Hub – Cross-Border Export – Baby Vegetables to EU (Netherlands) – Phytosanitary Cert
Description: ZANIS phytosanitary export certificate and EU TRACES notification for 22 MT premium baby vegetables airfreighted from LKIA to Netherlands. EU plant health certificate PHY-2025-0412. Netherlands NVWA pre-notification NVWA-ZM-2025-0412. GlobalG.A.P. cert GP-ZM-2025-0021 attached.
